name: ZEROBASEONE
description: ZEROBASEONE (ZB1) is a nine-member project boy group formed through Mnet's Boys Planet, known for their sweet concept, fresh energy, and explosive global rookie debut.

funFacts: Won first place on Boys Planet finale
Known for his exceptional dance skills
Caring leader who looks after members
Has a soft and thoughtful personality
members.bio: Hanbin is the leader and center of ZEROBASEONE after finishing first on Boys Planet. His powerful dancing and caring leadership keep the group grounded.

funFacts: Worked as an actor before joining ZB1
Speaks softly with a warm presence
Known for his thoughtful interview answers
members.bio: Jiwoong is ZB1's oldest member and visual, often compared to a manhwa protagonist. His acting background gives him stage presence and a quiet, warm charisma.

funFacts: Was second place on Boys Planet
members.bio: Hao is ZB1's main vocalist from China, a classically trained violinist with stable and soaring vocals. He brings instrumental depth and emotion to the group's sound.

funFacts: Known for his soft, honey-toned voice
members.bio: Matthew is ZB1's Korean-Canadian vocalist with a soft, honey-toned voice and warm bright energy. He often interacts in English with global fans.

funFacts: Praised as a vocal prodigy on Boys Planet
Loves composing in his free time
members.bio: Taerae is ZB1's vocal prodigy, with an emotive tone that earned him "vocal genius" reputation on Boys Planet. He composes in his spare time.

funFacts: Has soft visual energy with sharp features
members.bio: Ricky is ZB1's Chinese member known for soft yet sharp visuals and an outgoing, playful energy. His bilingual charm bridges Korean and Chinese fans.

funFacts: One of the tallest in the group at 184cm
members.bio: Gyuvin is ZB1's mood maker — tall, energetic, and quick to make members laugh. His outgoing energy is felt on and off stage.

funFacts: Strong stage charisma despite shy nature
members.bio: Gunwook is ZB1's reserved rapper with a distinctive tone and sparkly star-like eyes. His on-stage charisma surprises fans who only know his shy off-stage side.
Yujin is ZB1's youngest member — a tall maknae with a puppy-like charm and surprising thoughtfulness for his age. The hyungs dote on him constantly.

seo.title: ZEROBASEONE Name Generator | Create Your Korean Name with ZEROSE
seo.description: Create your ZEROBASEONE name with Sung Hanbin, Zhang Hao, Han Yujin & all 9 members! Instant chemistry scores & Korean stage names. Perfect for ZEROSE fanfiction.
